title: Draft invoice totals GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of the totals of draft invoices for a single employee and acccounting period.

netAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The total invoice amount for all draft invoices in the base currency of the agreement before all taxes and discounts have been applied.

customers.description: A reference to the draft invoices totals customers resource.

acccountingYears.description: A reference to the draft invoices totals accounting years resource.

period.title: Accounting period
period.description: A specific period in the accounting year.

periodNumber.description: A unique identifier of the period.

self.description: A unique link reference to the accounting year period.
A reference to the current resource.
